query: SELECT exitReason, signal, COUNT(*) as count, ROUND(AVG(realizedPnlPct),2) as avgPnlPct, ROUND(SUM(realizedPnl),2) as totalPnl, ROUND(AVG(TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, openedAt, closedAt)),0) as avgHoldMin FROM paperTrades WHERE sessionId = 25 GROUP BY exitReason, signal ORDER BY totalPnl DESC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2fRMU9WuDe4UzGh.6d94b4c6929d --database MmWmJbH77mYYXTZazVYpbM --execute SELECT exitReason, signal, COUNT(*) as count, ROUND(AVG(realizedPnlPct),2) as avgPnlPct, ROUND(SUM(realizedPnl),2) as totalPnl, ROUND(AVG(TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, openedAt, closedAt)),0) as avgHoldMin FROM paperTrades WHERE sessionId = 25 GROUP BY exitReason, signal ORDER BY totalPnl DESC;
